datasets.name: filter_regions
queryLines:
SELECT DISTINCT
      region as value,
      region as label
  FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_regional_pnl
  WHERE region IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY value

datasets.name: filter_locations
queryLines:
SELECT value, label FROM (
      SELECT DISTINCT
          location as value,
          location as label
      FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_enterprise_metrics
      WHERE location IS NOT NULL
  ) t
  ORDER BY value

datasets.name: filter_practice_areas
queryLines:
SELECT value, label FROM (
      SELECT DISTINCT
          practice_area as value,
          practice_area as label
      FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_enterprise_metrics
      WHERE practice_area IS NOT NULL

      UNION ALL

      SELECT
          'All' as value,
          'All' as label
  ) t
  ORDER BY CASE WHEN value = 'All' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, value

datasets.name: filter_industries
queryLines:
SELECT value, label FROM (
      SELECT DISTINCT
          industry as value,
          industry as label
      FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_enterprise_metrics
      WHERE industry IS NOT NULL

      UNION ALL

      SELECT
          'All' as value,
          'All' as label
  ) t
  ORDER BY CASE WHEN value = 'All' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, value

datasets.name: filter_customers
queryLines:
SELECT value, label FROM (
      SELECT DISTINCT
          customer as value,
          customer as label
      FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_enterprise_metrics
      WHERE customer IS NOT NULL

      UNION ALL

      SELECT
          'All' as value,
          'All' as label
  ) t
  ORDER BY CASE WHEN value = 'All' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, value

datasets.name: accrued_revenues_calc
queryLines:
-- Accrued Revenues: last complete month actual (annualized) vs forecast (annualized)
WITH metrics AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(total_revenue) * 12 AS annualized_revenue,
        SUM(budgeted_revenue) * 12 AS forecasted_revenue
    FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_regional_pnl
    WHERE fiscal_period = ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1)
      AND (:region IS NULL OR array_size(:region) = 0 OR array_contains(:region, 'All') OR array_contains(:region, region))
      AND (:location IS NULL OR array_size(:location) = 0 OR array_contains(:location, 'All') OR array_contains(:location, location))
      AND (:practice_area IS NULL OR array_size(:practice_area) = 0 OR array_contains(:practice_area, 'All') OR array_contains(:practice_area, practice_area))
      AND (:industry IS NULL OR array_size(:industry) = 0 OR array_contains(:industry, 'All') OR array_contains(:industry, industry))
      AND (:customer IS NULL OR array_size(:customer) = 0 OR array_contains(:customer, 'All') OR array_contains(:customer, customer))
)
SELECT annualized_revenue AS current_value, forecasted_revenue AS previous_value FROM metrics

datasets.name: partner_headcount_calc
queryLines:
-- Partner Headcount: M/M comparison (active partners only — excludes terminated employees that appear in latest snapshot)
WITH max_snap AS (
    SELECT MAX(snapshot_date) AS max_date FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.silver_dim_employees
),
prior_snap AS (
    SELECT MAX(snapshot_date) AS prior_date
    FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.silver_dim_employees, max_snap
    WHERE snapshot_date <= DATE_SUB(max_date, 30)
),
current_partners AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT employee_id) AS partner_count
    FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.silver_dim_employees, max_snap
    WHERE job_level = 'Partner' AND snapshot_date = max_date
      AND employment_status = 'Active'
),
previous_partners AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT employee_id) AS partner_count
    FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.silver_dim_employees, prior_snap
    WHERE job_level = 'Partner' AND snapshot_date = prior_date
      AND employment_status = 'Active'
)
SELECT c.partner_count AS current_value, p.partner_count AS previous_value
FROM current_partners c CROSS JOIN previous_partners p

datasets.name: revenue_per_partner_calc
queryLines:
-- Revenue per Partner: YoY (last complete month vs same month last year, active partners only)
WITH max_snap AS (
    SELECT MAX(snapshot_date) AS max_date FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.silver_dim_employees
),
yoy_snap AS (
    SELECT MAX(snapshot_date) AS yoy_date
    FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.silver_dim_employees, max_snap
    WHERE snapshot_date <= ADD_MONTHS(max_date, -12)
),
current_partners AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT employee_id) AS partner_count
    FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.silver_dim_employees, max_snap
    WHERE job_level = 'Partner' AND snapshot_date = max_date
      AND employment_status = 'Active'
),
yoy_partners AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT employee_id) AS partner_count
    FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.silver_dim_employees, yoy_snap
    WHERE job_level = 'Partner' AND snapshot_date = yoy_date
      AND employment_status = 'Active'
),
current_revenue AS (
    SELECT SUM(revenue) * 12 AS rev
    FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_enterprise_metrics
    WHERE fiscal_period = ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1)
      AND (:region IS NULL OR array_size(:region) = 0 OR array_contains(:region, 'All') OR array_contains(:region, region))
      AND (:location IS NULL OR array_size(:location) = 0 OR array_contains(:location, 'All') OR array_contains(:location, location))
      AND (:practice_area IS NULL OR array_size(:practice_area) = 0 OR array_contains(:practice_area, 'All') OR array_contains(:practice_area, practice_area))
      AND (:industry IS NULL OR array_size(:industry) = 0 OR array_contains(:industry, 'All') OR array_contains(:industry, industry))
      AND (:customer IS NULL OR array_size(:customer) = 0 OR array_contains(:customer, 'All') OR array_contains(:customer, customer))
),
yoy_revenue AS (
    SELECT SUM(revenue) * 12 AS rev
    FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_enterprise_metrics
    WHERE fiscal_period = ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -13)
      AND (:region IS NULL OR array_size(:region) = 0 OR array_contains(:region, 'All') OR array_contains(:region, region))
      AND (:location IS NULL OR array_size(:location) = 0 OR array_contains(:location, 'All') OR array_contains(:location, location))
      AND (:practice_area IS NULL OR array_size(:practice_area) = 0 OR array_contains(:practice_area, 'All') OR array_contains(:practice_area, practice_area))
      AND (:industry IS NULL OR array_size(:industry) = 0 OR array_contains(:industry, 'All') OR array_contains(:industry, industry))
      AND (:customer IS NULL OR array_size(:customer) = 0 OR array_contains(:customer, 'All') OR array_contains(:customer, customer))
)
SELECT
    CASE WHEN cp.partner_count > 0 THEN cr.rev / cp.partner_count ELSE 0 END AS current_value,
    CASE WHEN yp.partner_count > 0 THEN yr.rev / yp.partner_count ELSE 0 END AS previous_value
FROM current_revenue cr CROSS JOIN current_partners cp
CROSS JOIN yoy_revenue yr CROSS JOIN yoy_partners yp

datasets.name: expenses_calc
queryLines:
-- Expenses: last complete month actual (annualized) vs forecast (annualized)
WITH metrics AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(billable_expenses + corporate_expenses + marketing_expenses + tech_expenses + other_expenses) * 12 AS annualized_actual,
        SUM(budgeted_expenses) * 12 AS annualized_budget
    FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_regional_pnl
    WHERE fiscal_period = ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1)
      AND (:region IS NULL OR array_size(:region) = 0 OR array_contains(:region, 'All') OR array_contains(:region, region))
      AND (:location IS NULL OR array_size(:location) = 0 OR array_contains(:location, 'All') OR array_contains(:location, location))
      AND (:practice_area IS NULL OR array_size(:practice_area) = 0 OR array_contains(:practice_area, 'All') OR array_contains(:practice_area, practice_area))
      AND (:industry IS NULL OR array_size(:industry) = 0 OR array_contains(:industry, 'All') OR array_contains(:industry, industry))
      AND (:customer IS NULL OR array_size(:customer) = 0 OR array_contains(:customer, 'All') OR array_contains(:customer, customer))
)
SELECT annualized_actual AS current_value, annualized_budget AS previous_value FROM metrics

datasets.name: project_margins_calc
queryLines:
-- Project Gross Margins: QoQ comparison (last 90 days vs prior 90 days)
-- Divide by 100 because actual_margin_pct is stored as 10-50 range and widget formatter multiplies by 100
WITH current_margins AS (
    SELECT SUM(actual_margin) / NULLIF(SUM(actual_revenue), 0) AS avg_margin
    FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_project_profitability
    WHERE 
     project_end_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 90)
),
previous_margins AS (
    SELECT SUM(actual_margin) / NULLIF(SUM(actual_revenue), 0) AS avg_margin
    FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_project_profitability
    WHERE 
     project_end_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 180) AND DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 90)
)
SELECT COALESCE(c.avg_margin, 0) AS current_value, COALESCE(p.avg_margin, 0) AS previous_value
FROM current_margins c CROSS JOIN previous_margins p

datasets.name: regional_revenue_trends
queryLines:
WITH filtered_data AS (

    SELECT

      location as office,

      SUM(CASE WHEN revenue_type = 'Billable' THEN total_revenue ELSE 0 END) as billable_revenue,

      SUM(CASE WHEN revenue_type = 'Products' THEN total_revenue ELSE 0 END) as products_revenue,

      SUM(CASE WHEN revenue_type = 'Partnerships' THEN total_revenue ELSE 0 END) as partnerships_revenue,

      SUM(CASE WHEN revenue_type = 'Other' THEN total_revenue ELSE 0 END) as other_revenue,

      SUM(budgeted_revenue) as projected_revenue       -- real per-office target from gold_regional_pnl.budgeted_revenue

    FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_regional_pnl

    WHERE

      fiscal_period >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 180)

      AND (:region IS NULL

           OR array_size(:region) = 0

           OR array_contains(:region, 'All')

           OR array_contains(:region, region))

      AND (:location IS NULL

           OR array_size(:location) = 0

           OR array_contains(:location, 'All')

           OR array_contains(:location, location))

      AND (:practice_area IS NULL

           OR array_size(:practice_area) = 0

           OR array_contains(:practice_area, 'All')

           OR array_contains(:practice_area, practice_area))

      AND (:industry IS NULL

           OR array_size(:industry) = 0

           OR array_contains(:industry, 'All')

           OR array_contains(:industry, industry))

      AND (:customer IS NULL

           OR array_size(:customer) = 0

           OR array_contains(:customer, 'All')

           OR array_contains(:customer, customer))

    GROUP BY location

  )

  SELECT * FROM filtered_data

  ORDER BY office

datasets.name: regional_expense_trends
queryLines:
WITH filtered_data AS (
    SELECT
      location as office,
      SUM(billable_expenses)  as billable_expenses,
      SUM(corporate_expenses) as corporate_expenses,
      SUM(marketing_expenses) as marketing_expenses,
      SUM(tech_expenses)      as tech_expenses,
      SUM(other_expenses)     as other_expenses,
      SUM(budgeted_expenses)  as budgeted_expenses
    FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_regional_pnl
    WHERE
      fiscal_period >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 180)
      AND (:region IS NULL OR array_size(:region) = 0 OR array_contains(:region, 'All') OR array_contains(:region, region))
      AND (:location IS NULL OR array_size(:location) = 0 OR array_contains(:location, 'All') OR array_contains(:location, location))
      AND (:practice_area IS NULL OR array_size(:practice_area) = 0 OR array_contains(:practice_area, 'All') OR array_contains(:practice_area, practice_area))
      AND (:industry IS NULL OR array_size(:industry) = 0 OR array_contains(:industry, 'All') OR array_contains(:industry, industry))
      AND (:customer IS NULL OR array_size(:customer) = 0 OR array_contains(:customer, 'All') OR array_contains(:customer, customer))
    GROUP BY location
)
SELECT * FROM filtered_data ORDER BY office

datasets.name: industry_breakdown
queryLines:
-- Industry revenue breakdown (Using Real Data)
  SELECT
    industry,
    SUM(actual_revenue) as revenue
  FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_project_profitability
  WHERE project_status IN ('Active', 'Completed')
    AND actual_revenue > 0
    AND (:region IS NULL
         OR array_size(:region) = 0
         OR array_contains(:region, 'All')
         OR array_contains(:region, region))
    AND (:location IS NULL
         OR array_size(:location) = 0
         OR array_contains(:location, 'All')
         OR array_contains(:location, location))
    AND (:practice_area IS NULL
         OR array_size(:practice_area) = 0
         OR array_contains(:practice_area, 'All')
         OR array_contains(:practice_area, practice_area))
    AND (:industry IS NULL
         OR array_size(:industry) = 0
         OR array_contains(:industry, 'All')
         OR array_contains(:industry, industry))
    AND (:customer IS NULL
         OR array_size(:customer) = 0
         OR array_contains(:customer, 'All')
         OR array_contains(:customer, customer))
  GROUP BY industry
  ORDER BY revenue DESC

datasets.name: practice_area_breakdown
queryLines:
-- Practice area revenue breakdown (Using Real Data)
  SELECT
    practice_area as practice,
    SUM(actual_revenue) as revenue
  FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_project_profitability
  WHERE project_status IN ('Active', 'Completed')
    AND actual_revenue > 0
    AND (:region IS NULL
         OR array_size(:region) = 0
         OR array_contains(:region, 'All')
         OR array_contains(:region, region))
    AND (:location IS NULL
         OR array_size(:location) = 0
         OR array_contains(:location, 'All')
         OR array_contains(:location, location))
    AND (:practice_area IS NULL
         OR array_size(:practice_area) = 0
         OR array_contains(:practice_area, 'All')
         OR array_contains(:practice_area, practice_area))
    AND (:industry IS NULL
         OR array_size(:industry) = 0
         OR array_contains(:industry, 'All')
         OR array_contains(:industry, industry))
    AND (:customer IS NULL
         OR array_size(:customer) = 0
         OR array_contains(:customer, 'All')
         OR array_contains(:customer, customer))
  GROUP BY practice_area
  ORDER BY revenue DESC

frame.title: Revenue by Practice Area or Service Line
